notes: ACS line-drawing is terminal-general: the crate translates each A_ALTCHARSET glyph through the cap's `acsc` map at emit time. xterm (identity acsc, `\e(0`/`\e(B`), screen (identity acsc, `^N`/`^O`), and cygwin (NON-identity acsc -> CP437 bytes, smacs `\e[11m`/rmacs `\e[10m`) all reproduce real ncurses byte-for-byte. This closes the non-identity acsc glyph-remapping item (STRUCT-04).
oracle_method: draw an ACS hline + box on an 80x24 pty under each TERM; strip the shared framing; compare the line-drawing body to the crate's doupdate with that terminal's sgr/rmacs/acsc caps
